hooks.command: cd /home/user/kitchen_buddy && echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q "git commit" && (npm run lint && npm run format:check) || true
hooks.description: Lint and format check before git commit

hooks.command: cd /home/user/kitchen_buddy && echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q "git push" && npm test || true
hooks.description: Run full test suite before git push

hooks.command: cd /home/user/kitchen_buddy && npm run format:check --silent 2>/dev/null || echo '[hook] Format drift detected — run npm run format'
hooks.description: Warn on format drift after file edits

hooks.command: cd /home/user/kitchen_buddy && echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q "git commit" && git branch --show-current | grep -q "feature/" && echo "[hook] Remember to check off completed tasks in .kiro/specs/*/tasks.md" || true
hooks.description: Remind to update spec tasks.md after commits on feature branches
